# Sub-phase b4_non_coding (fixture)

> Synthetic non-coding sub-phase. Activities are research-only.

## Objective

Produce research notes summarizing candidate frameworks. The post-execution
review classifies as non-coding because the verification mentions only
"produce research notes" — no source paths and no automated checks.

## Verification

- Manual: confirm the research output reads as a coherent summary.
- No automated checks required.
